review_text: Lovely cabin and location. Cabin very spacious and clean.
Very clean and neat house. A little negative thing is that the pillows are too hard and there is no dish washer

Unfortunately, the experience did not meet expectations for several reasons.

The condition of the room was a primary concern, as the accommodations appeared outdated. More importantly, there were significant issues with hygiene and cleanliness, which were particularly distressing as I was traveling with two children. The room contained a large number of flies, and we noted a similar issue with insects covering the exterior of our vehicle.

Furthermore, the condition of the grounds, specifically the dusty and gravel surfaces in non-concreted areas, contributed to an unpleasant environment. It appears that the housekeeping and general maintenance standards are currently insufficient.

I hope you will take this feedback into consideration to improve the experience for future guests.
Best kept holiday park I've stayed in.
Wonderful sites, well looked after ground, so much for kids to do, staff are super helpful and pleasant wonderful facilities. We all can’t wait to come back again!
Very good experience. Kids enjoyed whole holiday break here.
Great place for families and business alike, loved it

My son and I stayed in a studio room with Ensuite. I have never stayed at a BIG4 before and were super impressed.
The room was clean and tidy, the check-in service was friendly and well informed.
The grounds were clean and there was many things to keep my 8yr old entertained.
I cannot fault this place honestly and would stay here again if I ever need to.
Good facilities and a nice park, but poor customer service. Unfortunately, that side of things really impacts the overall experience
It never disappoints

Have just spent 2 days at your park and could not have been happier. Amenities are spotless, well maintained and warm. The grounds are manicured and staff very friendly. Caravan sites have concrete pad and are well marked and size more than adequate. Will recommend and return.
PS Although we did not avail them, noted great holiday options for the families too.

Fantastic staff and well managed site..
Couldn't ask for more...
Easy access to our en suite site. Little too cold for the lovely spa pool area

Great park, Clean Ammenities, Great Location - Only fault I had was their customer service, I requested if I could check in a few hours earlier with my Perks Membership, they declined as I would be able to use their facilities? I've paid for the day anyway, and their boom gates don't work - so anyone could come in at any time of the day/or night to use them anyway.. Very disappointed as I've never had issues checking-in earlier at other Big4s. I won't be returning, but I will be taking my business back to the Big4 I usually stay in Bendigo.

One of the best caravan parks we have stayed in. Amenities were spotlessly clean. Staff were friendly and helpful. They have lovely clean sites with concrete slabs and a nice grassy lawn right beside the concrete. Cost of overnight stay was very good, not outrageous like some we have seen.

My wife and I recently stayed in one of the new glamping caravans at Tasman Holiday Park in Bendigo and absolutely loved it. The whole setup is incredibly cute and thoughtfully designed, with an amazing attention to detail. Everything you could possibly need for a perfect night away has already been thought of and included.

The vibe is cozy, stylish, and a little bit special — it feels like a fun mix of camping and boutique accommodation. You get the charm of being outdoors but with all the comforts that make it relaxing rather than roughing it.

It’s clear a lot of care has gone into creating these spaces, and it really shows. We had such a great time and would happily stay again. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a unique and charming little getaway.

We have just spent a night at the Big 4 Tasman Caravan Park Bendigo and wanted to put a review after a very pleasant experience - the best we have seen. We had a powered site and found it was well set out with a shaded grassed area and concrete slab that felt private. The amenities were excellent - great showers with a shower curtain extremely clean and well set out. The dump point was a work of art - it was housed in a special room and spotlessly clean. It is a well thought out caravan park with things for everyone - “the hub”, a mini gym, an air conditioned beautiful kitchen with gas bbqs adjoining that area, a kids area, putt-putt. There were cabins and glamping tents and retro vans. The receptionist was very helpful. We were very Impressed and wanted to recommend it to others who are visiting Bendigo. Davenjude.
We have stayed here 4 times in 2 years and would highly recommend staying here. The park is well maintained and staff are very attentive and friendly.

Spacious, clean and bright cabins. Staff are very friendly & courteous. This was our 3rd time staying at Park Lane Bendigo. It’s a great place to stay for our annual visit to the Woollen Mills.  Good place for kids to play on the jumping pillow. Recommend this park.
Fair bit of construction ensuite site was  excellent

What a fantastic find! My wife and I stayed for one night in a cabin but we enjoyed it so much we easily could have stayed for a week. From start to finish, the experience was seamless.
​
​The check-in process was fast and easy. We were met with a wonderful welcome at reception.

​Our cabin was absolutely brilliant. It felt brand new and was spotlessly clean. It was surprisingly spacious, nicely furnished, and very well-equipped with everything you could possibly need.

​The park itself is in a great location with very pleasant, well-maintained surroundings. It’s a peaceful spot that feels well-organized and welcoming.
​
What a great choice! If you are looking for a pleasant and super comfy accommodation in Bendigo, this is it. Highly recommended!

We had a fantastic stay at BIG4 Bendigo Park Lane. The cabin was spotless, comfortable, and well equipped. The park is very family-friendly, and the kids absolutely loved the indoor play centre and all the activities available.||Everything was clean and well maintained, and the atmosphere was relaxed and welcoming. The staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay.||We would definitely come back and highly recommend it for families visiting Bendigo!
The park is immaculate and the facilities are very clean but there are excessive flies in the sites nearest the road and so much noise from trucks at night.
A great clean caravan park out of town. Clean facilities and lovely staff.
Great place for a short stay

We have been here a few times now. The cabins are not cleaned at all, they are filthy! When we arrived we had about 10-12 flys in the cabin, they had not emptied the bin liners out there was the previous guests pad in there! In the bunk beds the blankets were filthy one of the blankets had snot all over it! To give you even more of idea there was a dust pan and brush in the cupboard that was covered in faecal matter! Even our sheets has snot on them! We stayed all morning one of the mornings we were there and watched the guests check out next to us in their cabin and we watched to see if the cleaners would come and clean the cabin and they didn't come at all to clean the cabin before the next guests arrive. Not to mention the reception lady was incredibly rude to my husband checking out this morning!

This is not the first time we have not had a great stay either the previous time we were up they had renovated and put us in a half painted cabin and the fumes were horrid like they had just painted it that morning, we were missing side tables and because we had young children with us we had to ask to be moved- at our own expense of course!
Exactly what you should get from a caravan park
Amazing place, come here every year, Girls at reception are amazing and very helpful😊

Booked an ensuite site for a week. And it was great.|Ensuite site was clean, spacious, tidy. |There is a indoor play centre on site, it is in need of a clean ~ but its also in a big shed so dust is expected.|We were lucky to have a super hot week, and used the pool EVERY DAY. Until close. |Kitchen was clean and tidy. |Some sites are tight to get into if you have a big van. |A few minutes drive out of town, but there is a COLES a few minutes away.|We will be back!

We had a fantastic stay at Big 4 Park Lane Bendigo over the long weekend. We had a superior ensuite site. The ensuite was beautiful renovated and our site was clean and a good size.
The facilities were well mantained. The indoor playground was amazing and my kids loved playing in the pool all day.
The only downside was that the fridge in the camp kitchen was on the smaller side which meant it was very full over a busy period like a long weekend, however this is a very minor complaint.
Would highly recommend and we would be back again.

A smaller caravan park, well situated for Sovereign Hill theme park and not too far from town area.
Road ways are a tad narrow - if a car is parked on the road you have to mount the gutter to go through, but this seems to be the norm as with other parks.
Has a pool, jumping pillow and indoor spa.
Ammeties are very clean, large camp kitchen, bbq's located throughout the park. Dump point is unique in its "Aussie " feel.
All over a good place to stay.

Wonderful park with great amenities. Cabins were clean and comfortable and there's enough activities for kids to do. Just on the outskirts of town which is a blessing and also a bit annoying being away from walking distance things but you can make do as its only a short drive back into town. Will come back again.

Recommend for families that want to do a budgeting holiday, Rooms are filled with bugs and wifi doesn’t work so be prepared to be a new person sadly when you first walk in your room, my room was sadly filled with bugs and Ants crawling around, my room was room 10, greetings

Good little caravan park. Cabins could use a little upgrade - especially air con. The air con didn't work great and with one unit in the lounge and 1 in 1 of the back rooms, there were still 2 rooms with no air con and during 37 degree weather it was uncomfortable.

Comfy beds, bathrooms could use a little TLC and the toilet paper could be upgraded from 1 ply
Absolutely spotless.  Lovely site. We had our motorhome and tow car. Pool clean. Amenities always tip top.  We liked the location for access to bendigo.
Great place to put up your feet for a few days.

Well laid out park, spacious sites, well cared for grounds. Lots of things to occupy kids. |Amenities are large and absolutely spotless. Cleaned several times every day.|Need a car to get around, not too many shops close.
Stayed in the Vibtage Caravan, Patty, and cannot wait to do it again !! Amazing customer service. Everything is clean and well maintained. Congratulations for a great holiday destination
Clean and quiet amenities very clean park well maintained and staff very good to deal with

Unfortunately they have too many cabins/sites in their park now and they can not get enough electricity to all sites. Had fuses go and then issues with the pole as drawing more power than they have access too. Recommend to not go in summer when you need AC or in winter when you need a heater. We spent hours sitting in a pub trying to stay cool!

Great caravan park. It has great facilities for everyone especially families with children and is very clean.

The ladies in the office were friendly and very helpful.

I have stayed here previously and thoroughly enjoyed my experience. Recently, I attempted to book accommodation for this coming weekend and initially spoke with a lovely staff member who was extremely helpful and assisted me with my enquiries. I was advised that booking directly could offer a better rate than third-party platforms, which had been beneficial on a previous stay for myself ,

I asked if I could call back within 10 minutes to confirm details with my partner and other guests, and was told this would be fine.

When I called back shortly after, I spoke with a different staff member who was noticeably less courteous. The quoted price had increased by $20 compared to what I was initially advised.

While this amount was not significant, Booking.com was offering a cheaper rate. I explained that if the original price could not be honoured, I would proceed with booking online instead.

After thanking the staff member for their time, I immediately attempted to book through Booking.com and Wotif, only to find that prices on both platforms had increased by over $200.

This sudden change was extremely disappointing and felt unprofessional. I believe the staff member’s name was Helen.
Unfortunately, this experience has left a very poor impression and has resulted in the loss of my business. I hope management can review this situation and provide appropriate customer service training to prevent similar issues in the future- as this lady should not be dealing with customers.
It is a very clean park, the moment a caravan pulls out the groundsman go over the site, and if need be put the sprinkler on. The pool was spotless.
Beautiful park awesome staff fantastic facilities

Amazing facilities and really clean. A special mention to Chris the maintenance guy who was really accommodating especially for someone thats in a wheelchair. Chris knocked up a ramp for me to make things more accessible
Our whole family loved this caravan park. It was a shame that we couldn’t stay longer. Fantastic free activities and additional school holiday activities. Beautifully clean and tidy.
Fantastic facility, so many activities for the kids. The cabins were beautifully clean and our kids loved the free games and holiday activities.
Out of town a bit but lovely caravan park well looked after very clean

Very nice park. Extremely clean amenities. Tons of facilities / things to do if you have kids or just like to do things on your holiday. Also good for sitting and doing nothing. Not super quiet but not too bad. Did smell like cattle the day we arrived, not sure if that's due to proximity of race course or something else, but it seems to have subsided. Can hear the trains and the main road nearby but it's not too loud. Nice grass for camping. Good shade without worrying a gum tree is going to drop a branch on you while you're sleeping. The office sells icecreams.

Close to the rail line so trains all night
Impersonal "computer only " staff interactions .
Inferred I was a liar or idiot no appologies for their app not working on my phone
Rubbish cutlery , i have melted better in my foundry .
Cheap & nasty all the way , everything cut to bare minimum
Disgustingly poor staff training up to & including telling me some one was new to cove their mistakes and try to shift blame onto me .
Pretend friendliness felt so fake as to make me unwelcome
Thoroughly enjoyed our stay here.  The park is immaculate.Facilities are spotless and the staff very welcoming and helpful.  We will definitely be back.
Great 2 bedroom cabin in this lovely park. Comfortable beds, great shower, toiletries provided, roomy cabin. Park has BBQs in several places, well maintained grounds.|Friendly staff at check in.

They wanted $90 for a powered site for a motorhome.  I declined, explaining that this made them one of the most expensive caravan parks in Australia.  There are plenty of others that are cheaper.  Drive past.

Very clean park and cabins but be aware that 2 bathrooms in a cabin may mean 1 bathroom with shower and toilet and just 1 toilet! A range of facilities for kids however the mini golf is VERY tired. (Eg can’t read the hole numbers). Pool isn’t heated. Good bbq facilities. Lastly VERY expensive -$1009 for 2 nights in Platinum Villa.  (Not only my thoughts as I was in the office when a van arrived. Man was told $90 for one night for site.) Our annual family reunion group (34 this year) will likely look elsewhere for next year.

Wish they told me kids were tricker treating here for Halloween my nephew's American and he loves it . Could've done something spooky even us workers here would've went with it kids need happy memories . And you should build a deck so  people can see the  horses next door horses are therapy animals it'll make you more money wine and watching horse

Incredibly rude woman behind counter.
Wouldn’t simply walk to my site and view the problem with the power point. Instead insisted that I buy an adapter. I spoke to an electrician and was assured that she doesn’t know what she’s talking about.
Don’t go there.
Great park, very clean and modern with friendly,  helpful staff.
Great caravan park, good location, cabin was very clean. Pool looked amazing.

Perfect night stay here!

Stayed in the Pooch pad and it had everything that was needed so very grateful.

Very clean and tidy park with great amenities! Will happily stay again ◡̈

One of the best and cleanest caravan parks I have ever stayed at. Shower block was spotless. Went during school holidays and the staff ran marshmallow toasting over the open fire for the kids and pancake breakfasts as well. My son had a ball. Awesome park. We will be back!

Stayed on a powered site for a couple of nights during a business trip. Very helpful and nice front desk staff. Ample space on site for the van and overall a very peaceful, clean and well managed park. Will be back again.

Had a short stay at Park Lane. Cabin was very clean, staff were very friendly. Kids loved the indoor playground, pool and bouncing pillow! The whole caravan park had a really friendly and welcoming feel!
Could do with some grass and trees.
Friendly staff  and amazing  set-up for kids.jumping pillow. Pedal carts. A great family atmosphere. Will definitely  stay  a 3rd time and more.
What a fantastic CP. Had the air con on for us in the great cabin weve got. So lovely and cool. Kids play gym brilliant.  Great pool bbq kitchen.  Whole set up is great

Fantastic caravan park pretty close to everything of interest in Bendigo. |The grandkids all loved the facilities - espcially the plat centre, pool and pedal carts. There is still work being done, but enough is up and on the go to make it a great stay. We had an ensuite site which was amazing and top notch. Truly cannot fault the place! If you have energetic kids, and are around Bendigo, this is the place!
Great place for family’s . We had the best time . Will be going back 🤗

We had a great (short) stay at the gorgeous Park Lane Holiday Park!
Easily accessible off the main road.
Helpful staff who provided maps and recommendations for dinner.
Spacious, clean and fully stocked cabin. Great pool and spa area. Lots to do; Jumping pillow, playground, basketball play, go karts and camp kitchen space.
A massive play ‘building’ which we didn’t use but could show that would attract families with children.
Unfortunately no tv reception as the local antenna at Harcourt was damaged in the recent fires. Limited wifi/reception. No issue as we were only there one night.
A good kiosk with lots of variety on offer.

This was my families first time staying at Parklane holiday park and we thoroughly enjoyed ourselves. The staff were amazing especially Michelle she helped as multiple times and was very kind, caring and very helpful. We are so happy with our service from parklane that we decided we are going to do every parklane holiday park in Victoria. Thank you so much for everything and we will be visiting again ❤️
BEST CARAVAN PSRK EVER

What a great park for a family holiday.. just back from a 4 night stay at Park Lane Holiday Park. It would have to be one of the cleanest parks and well maintained gardens that i have stayed at.  Kids loved the pools and we able to swim till 8:45 -9pm which was amazing with the heat we had. The play center was also a great place for the kids to play.. Kids didn't want to leave the park. Well done to the team there.

We absolutely loved our stay at BIG4 Bendigo Park Lane. The rooms were fantastic—spotlessly clean, comfortable, and well equipped with plenty of in-room facilities. The park itself is outstanding, especially for families with children. The facilities are excellent, and we were particularly impressed by the play centre, which kept the kids entertained for hours.

The staff were friendly, welcoming, and incredibly helpful. During a catastrophic fire warning, they remained calm, provided clear advice, and genuinely helped guests feel safe and supported, which was very reassuring.

Overall, a wonderful place to stay. We would definitely return and highly recommend it to families.
Had a ball here the staff are 100 percent cool as always happy to help you at any need of help can always point you in the right direction kid friendly 100 percent

Amazing caravan park to bring the kids- they loved the indoor playground and pool in the heat. My friend Courtney Watson pointed out that she didn’t think the wifi would reach us in the camping section and she was right. But I told her camping doesn’t need wifi.
Very bad wiffi !!

Cabin was clean and suited our family needs. |Take a decent knife and chopping board with you. |Staff were great and the atmosphere fun. |The games room was a joke. Torn and damaged 8 ball table with broken cues, a few old board games. Very disappointed. |Pool was small and crowded with a few families at a time. |Jumping mat was great for the smaller children. |Extra payment to use the large play/ climbing building with broken nets. Definitely not safe|Food / pizza and coffee  van delicious . |Compared to other adventures parks this one was very disappointing for the children

What a great caravan park! We stayed in our caravan with a private bathroom. I couldn't recommend it more if you're looking for great service. There's a massive indoor play area that was so useful when we had one wet day. The staff were all fantastic. Big shout out to Tegan and Anne-Marie; you both had smiles every time we would come to you for anything. More than happy to help us out. Loved how the staff were all just relaxed and easy to deal with!

Cleanest park we have ever been to. Staff were awesome and very welcoming.
Heated floors in the showers was just a bonus.

Great place to stay with kids! I only found that the kitchen was tiny (staying at 6 p economic cabin) and the electric blankets didn’t work. But it was very clean, everything you need to cook, the best part, kids can play at the indoor play center if there is rain. They also have a warmed spa which was nice to have on your own for 30min. Marshmallow by the fire at night for the kids! Really really nice!! Thank you! Will be back :)

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We stayed 3 days September 2025
This was by far the cleanest caravan we’ve ever stayed in absolutely spotless! The play equipment and outdoor spaces were so well designed and exciting for the kids, with every detail thoughtfully planned out. The whole environment was amazing and made our stay so enjoyable. To top it all off, the staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming. You can really see how much care has gone into creating such a great place for families. Highly recommend!
Awesome place to stay. Heaps for the kids to do. Will definitely come back glamping and a swim.
Easy, comfortable and welcoming. Ill come back

Best caravan park we've been to on our lap of Oz so far. Clean amenities, friendly staff. Even has  gym, spa and office facilities! Friday night they light the fire and bring the  marshmallows for clients. Has a mix of sites and cabins | Highly recommend this park

Absolutely beautiful van park.  Last time we were in Bendigo area we stayed out at Marong and reviewed that park as one of the best we have stayed in.  This park is right up there as well.  Beautifully maintained grounds, amenities, pool and spa area.  Staff were friendly, and helpful.
Bendigo itself is a beautiful city and we will be back.  Would definitely stay in this park again and have no hesitation in recommending to others.

Excellent range of accommodation at reasonable rates. Plenty of options to keep the children entertained with a jumping pillow, mini golf, play ground, half basketball court, pool, spa, toddler's play room and recreation room with games and Tv.

Comfortable and good value for money. Having the cabins warm when I arrived was a nice touch. |Bed Comfortable, shower clean. |This is an older cabin, there are newer ones on the property. |Fine for one night.

What an amazing park for anyone with kids or even just a couple, hubby described it as Disney land for kids. The ammenities were the cleanest ever seen. So much to do or just relax. Definitely going back
Great service. Great site. We’d happily return.

Wow 😮 What a clean, neat well run park. Has everything you need if travelling with a Motorhome/Caravan. The most looked after amenities I’ve seen in any park so far. Staff were really nice and friendly too.

We loved staying at The BIG 4 Tasman Holiday Park in White Hills, Bendigo. We had a very quiet unmade caravan site close to the racetrack which was fully powered and had water.
The Reception staff were very helpful and polite. The kitchen and bathroom facilities were extremely clean. Terrific Games room  (The Hub) which included a table tennis.

This has always been a beautiful place to stay. My partner and I have stayed here before, and more recently, my mother and father-in-law stayed as well. The caravan park itself is fantastic, but what truly stands out is the incredible care and service from Rod and the team.

Sadly, my father-in-law passed away unexpectedly during their stay, and the way they supported my mother-in-law was beyond kind—providing flowers, meals, a place to stay, and even refunding the trip. Their thoughtfulness helped bring comfort during such a difficult time.

Rod and the team will always hold a special place in our hearts for the compassion they showed when it was needed most.
Impressive park to visit with clean Amenities and helpful staff to assist

So many great facilities.
Lots of accommodation options.
Bit out of cbd.

Great location and great service from front of house to service staff. Staying in a caravan park with a week of rain not once did I see foot prints on the white tiled community bathrooms. Clean and well maintained even van sites were cleaned during the rain. Wouldn't hesitate to stay again.
Friendly staff, clean, well maintained facilities. Central to cbd

The staff have made my stay up in Bendigo amazing! Hailey in particular, has been very accommodating for my forever changing work roster.

The little Glamping cabins are soo cute and cosy, they heat up and cool down with A/C to make it easy to rest during work days. There is a little road noise but for me it’s soothing. The cabins are very clean and they’ve thought about everything in there, from a fridge, tv, microwave, comfy soft bed… and I mean everything.
Stayed in a pod here. Nice and cosy, short walk from car so didn’t have to carry my stuff like a normal hotel up flights of stairs or up an elevator very convenient indeed. Definitely recommend here.
Large caravan park, easy to find. Good size cabins. I was very happy as I had a dog friendly cabin.
Yes better signage to go to Reception would be good. Beware of price surging, copped it for a Thursday night (approx an extra $20) don’t know why parks do this it’s BS
Great little place just outside town. Only a few minutes drive to pretty much everything. Cabin was roomy, well presented and clean and beds were pretty comfortable. Will definitely return!

Schöner Platz, wir hatten einen Ensuite Platz, heißt, wir hatten unser eigenes 'Badezimmer'.
Super 👍. Die  Campingküche könnte etwas besser ausgestattet sein, das Notwendigste war da, aber wir haben immer mit unserem eigenen Pfannen gekocht und unser Geschirr benutzt. Sehr nettes Personal.

Liked:
The room was spacious and pet-friendly. Clean towels and nice shampoo/shower gel were provided.

Disliked:
1. The couch! It is DISGUSTING 😭 It's visibly dirty and actually broken. It looks as if they found this couch in a dumpster and brought it in. I am very grossed out by it. (All the furniture in our room felt quite dated, but the couch was the worst.)

2. There were many flies in the room. I killed at least eight before going to bed.

3. The 10 AM check-out time feels really early. 11 AM would have given guests more time to enjoy the facility and their breakfast.

4. Wifi didn't work.

Overall, we enjoyed our stay here with the dog and the baby, but I feel the room could use some renovation, and I wish we didn't have to rush to check out by 10 AM.

We Stayed at this park for my husband to attend the rugby 7’s tournament. From arrival the park is very colourful and very well presented. Reception staff very very friendly and kind. We got informed of other events on in the area to go and see as well as our own event.

We camped at the en-suite site with our camper trailer and they are amazing! Best en-suite site we have ever seen. Very clean, beautiful white towels provide and lovely soaps provided to use during the stay.

Would definitely recommend this place and we will go again.

On arrival,we opened the door and a terrible smell of oil hit us. Staff member was very helpful,came and sprayed our room. After a function we arrived back to cabin midnight to find out we had no hot water.  No showers to start out our day,made me a cranky person. Reported this to the office on our way out,was told we should have called at midnight, they would have come out and turned on the hot water. Not good enough Big 4,we paid extra this year due to rising costs,thats ok,however there should not be any issues with the cabins, no compensation was made for our inconvienance,being a member has made me think twice about renewing my membership.
Great place to stay. Very lovely and welcoming staff, bright and clean cabins. Friendly environment for pets, will definitely come back. Thanks!

Just had two nights at this amazing holiday park
Cannot rate cabins as we had a ensuite site which was a 10 out 10
Clean and everything provided
Pool and spa was great
Would certainly recommend and would stay again
Many thanks

Friendly staff, fun activities for the kids. Play centre was a winner.
Nice little holiday park.

We stayed there in a family villa for 6 days and not even once the house keeping showed up, first and last time for us.
Will not recommend
Great place and location

BIG4 Tasman Holiday Parks Bendigo is great!!!! I love the pump track and the jumping pillow. both are very fun for kids. The minigolf was also quite fun. The only thing i would recommend is adding a heated pool because in winter it would be great. but it is still good for summer.
Very clean and well appointed.

We stayed at a powered site in our van.  The facilities are exceptional and the staff I met were very helpful, polite and accommodating.  It is one of the best caravan parks we have stayed at and reasonably priced for what it has.  The showers and toilet facilities were spotless.   Exceptionally clean and very quiet.  Will definitely stay there again.
Lovely clean park. Very impressed

A lovely spot on the Wimera River.
The camp kitchen was modern, roomy,with everything you need.
Unsuite site was not so good. It desperately needed to be upgraded.
Great place for the kids & nice Glamping
Great little spot very central to bendigo, great kid spaces and excellent customer service, showers are fantastic and would recommend for young families.
Management and staff top notch, second time staying here, cannot fault amenities and staff. Hopefully will return to Bendigo soon
Great spot! Lots to do in Bendigo.
Wonderful experience! Would attend again

Helpful and friendly staff, easy access to a drop box facility for a late check in and an easy check out.
Heating was turned on in the cabin for a beautiful welcoming feeling, everything was spotless and sheets were lovely and soft. Would highly recommend 👌

A dog friendly cvan park located 10mins from Bendigo CBD. Staff welcoming and accommodating, and park very well maintained. We opted for an en-suite site that was large, had a concrete pad and natural green grass which my dog enjoyed. The site also faced the warming winter sun each day. Highly recommended. Communal firepit on weekends was appreciated
We had a huge grassy site perfect for our two doggos. Very clean amenities and brand new laundry equipment. Staff were friendly and helpful. Can't fault this park at all. Thanks for having us! 😊

Was an amazing park, clean great facilities and quiet. Staff were very helpful and friendly.  Beds were comfortable and lots of room for kids. The shower had great pressure and hot water aplenty. Would definitely stay again.
It was a nice holiday and it has an indoor playground a playground jumping pillow pool and the tv had nearly every streaming service I would definitely come back here again

Location is great. Cabin size is big and comfortable to still have space to relax. Will I go back with my family and kids? NO! The mattresses were uncomfortable. Kitchen and bathroom areas was not cleaned. Dried food left on plates, coffee marks on mugs. Floorboards and carpet were duty. Cleaning in this big4 park was very disappointing. Iv been to other big4 parks and there were always cleaners and stuff out and about cleaning. There was no one to been seen at any given time. Pool and sauna area was unattended by stuff during the open times. Other people were complaining about the same thing when speaking to them in the outside game and family room. Disappointing. I just wished all big4 parks had the same rules and regulations applied throughout their parks.
Apart from that, no regrets on our trips but i spent time cleaning and washing which was no problem until i got annoyed because I made sure I left the place cleaner than how I walked in.
Great location when spending most of the time out and about. Do keep in mind you need to do your own service and cleaning.
Cleaning service needs better attention with refilling items, Internet service is crap especially if the park is quite full but otherwise staff were friendly and the park was quite
Clamping tent was awesome, would definitely go and stay again.

This Big 4 Holiday Park is a beauty.
From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed by the lovely Chloe who was both friendly and professional.
We booked an ensuite site for our motorhome.
Each site is quite private with a lush grassy space separating vans.
The ensuite was spacious, modern and very clean. Instant hot water is always welcomed.
The park itself is very family friendly with a beautiful pool, giant chess set, basketball court and more.
The maintenance and cleaning crews are to be congratulated on their constant effort to ensure the grounds are kept to a high standard.
A short drive takes you into historical Bendigo with its magnificent buildings and history! We orientated ourselves to the city with a hop on hop off tram ride.
Another plus is that this park is a short walk to the Bendigo Race track, which we made the most of on a Tuesday race.
Highly recommend!

We stayed in a glamping tent at this park. Very cute accommodation. The park is lovely and clean, very well maintained. Park staff were very friendly and helpful with our children helping them into the hire bikes. There’s a great rec room with couches and tvs and the spar and pool very clean. A lovely stay for families! Well done guys. All facilities very clean and well maintained!

One of the best van parks we've stayed in, in our vanning adventures. Designated bike path from White Hills Botanical Garden along the Bendigo Creek into town and the main botanical gardens. Loved the indoor dump point, cleanest most user friendly facility we've come across.

Lovely small caravan park, close to the Botanical gardens for walks and cafe. Close to the Bendigo creek Bikeway for trips to the CBD. Very nice ensuite for van site and beautiful gardens for a very pleasant stay.

We stayed over Easter wanting to spend 3 nights in a caravan and were forced to stay 4. Because it was Easter, we were charged  over $500.00 for the four nights.
We coughed up for this amount as we booked late.
But more than that, the hotrod show  was in town. The park was full of hotrods and their self-absorbed owners. They were noisy  morning, noon, and night, blew up plumes of dust over our site every time one drove by, and belched strong fumes.
I have never made one complaint ever about any park we've stayed in, and I feel, on this occasion, we had been completely dudded. Plus, when I made the complaint, the owner really couldn't have cared less. Thanks for nothing Bendigo, its a nice park, but the worst we've ever stayed in. Also you are EXTREMELY GREEDY.

Absolutely awesome park, one of the best we have stayed in. The staff are very friendly and helpful, facilities are like new and always clean, showers have heated floors 👌. Communal fire pit, great recreation room and kitchen is seperate with large oven. Highly recommend this Park.
Great park great for kids jumping pillow mini golf to recreation room

One of the best caravan parks I've stayed in. Extremely neat and spacious sites. Amenities are wonderful, camp kitchen and pool area. In a great location not far from the main town centre. Highly recommend this park. 👍👍👍👍👍

Didn't sleep much of dog barking middle of. The night, I rang the reception if I can have another hour of sleep to check out at 11 am instead of 10am telling them of reason unfortunately she told me I have to pay add$50 for the hour ooooww! Didn't get any consideration

What a great park.  We stayed there in our Caravan.  Large grass site, amenities very clean, park very well kept.  Close to the town, the staff were very helpful and friendly.  We will definitely be coming back again.  Next time we will stay longer to enjoy all the things to do in Bendigo, beautiful building, parks, gardens, Museums etc. The town itself is very clean.  Definitely worth staying.

We were looking after our grandson while my daughter was having a baby( we live in Melbourne), and the park was a life saver in keeping him amused ( 15 months old). Lovely park, great cabins and lovely staff. We are going back to stay.
Aircons not real outstanding. Need a good clean.  Kids loved the pool, Games room, basketball etc. Nice clean cabin, grounds well kept.
Sehr ruhig bei Nacht. Keine Straße in der Nähe.

Loved staying there with the kids. Perfect get away with little ones. Indoor play centre was amazing. Great place to base yourself for a weekend getaway with the little ones. It's not the Ritz but we're not there for fancy hotel style rooms, just needed a bed and warm heaters. It had both of those

I scored number 3 and I am very happy to be staying here while working away from home.

Clean and spacious cabin with all amenities supplied.

The bed and pillows are very comfortable, tv in the bedroom and the shower has great pressure !

We had a lovely stay in a classic cabin. The cabin was quite new and very comfortable. The on site play centre was a hit with my 5 and 6yo as was the jumping pillow and spa (bit cold for the pool still). This is a very family friendly place. We will definitely be back.

I always travel with earplugs which helps with any noise.
The WiFi was not able to be connected to, I would say this was the proximity of our cabin to the office. I got a telstra sim and we used that for our internet during the trip (Vodafone is non-existent once you head out of the city area).

Our stay at BIG4 Park Lane Bendigo was very disappointing, and I would not recommend it.

We stayed here on 28/09/2025. The cabin was clean enough, but the sofa had stains which was not a great first impression. We stayed in a premium cabin and it is complete with amenities however it is not child friendly. Many sharp edges and wooden furniture.

The park does have plenty of amenities, but most of them are dirty, run-down, and in need of proper maintenance. The play centre in particular was filthy and unsafe in parts — clearly neglected.

The worst part, however, was the customer service. We arrived for the 2pm check-in as advertised on their own website, only to be told our room wasn’t ready. Staff tried to defend themselves by saying check-in is “from 2pm” and that they had “32 rooms to clean.” That is not the guest’s problem. If you can’t manage cleaning on time, hire more staff. Guests should not be left waiting for rooms when you advertise a clear check-in time. And no, guests don’t get to check out “from 10am” — it’s strict and enforced. The double standard is ridiculous.

To make things worse, the maintenance staff were flat-out rude. When my family went to use the pool at 9am, we were told we couldn’t because he was cleaning it and to come back in 30 minutes. This was said in an unhelpful and dismissive manner. Why on earth is pool cleaning scheduled during the one hour guests have before check-out? It’s inconsiderate, poor planning, and ruins the experience.

Overall, this park hides behind its long list of amenities, but the reality is poor cleanliness, substandard facilities, and shockingly bad customer service. The lack of professionalism and the rude attitude of staff completely overshadowed any positives.
Great facilities and the kids loved it!

Great park. Well set out however reception could have a bit better signage upon entry, we didn't see any obvious sign pointing up to reception because it's already such a colourful area with a lot of signs, maybe a painting on the road with Reception this way would be handy for those who havnt been before. Other than that it's a fantastic park. Ensuite sites are very practical and modern facilities. Family room in the main amenities that had a bath which was great for our youngest. The play centre is a fantastic addition and a great way to wear the kids out! A very family friendly park. It is close to a main road however the road noise wasn't really noticeable at night. The park is also located quite close to a shopping centre that has plenty of food options and supermarkets. Highly recommend this park if your travelling with kids to Bendigo.
Best family park by far. So many things for the kids to do and was always clean and neat.|Recommend this park to everyone.|Staff and owners were super friendly and nothing was too much bother.
Best caravan park in Bendigo perfect for families

Not rating room as we stayed on a powered site.

Amazing holiday park, 3 adults and 5 kids well stayed there 4 nights. Kids had a ball and we enjoyed our entire trip

Staff was lovely and amazing to deal with.. highly recommended

What an amazing experience. This park is so well maintained and represented. I stayed 1 night while travelling through the region. I was upgraded to a luxurious ensuite. Thank you . I will definitely be back.
Kids loved the park

Fantastic office staff and housekeeping staff. Nothing is too much trouble.
Maintainable people very capable and prompt.

We got a glamping pod for an overnight stay. It was lovely. The bed was soft and comfy, the bathroom was tiny, but clean and the water pressure was awesome. Check in and out was seamless and easy. Thanks for a lovely stay

Booked a caravan site for one night only but was upgraded to an ensuite site. The ensuite was terrific - clean, spacious and had everything needed, especially hot water. Park looks fabulous - kids' playgrounds and indoor Play area are amazing. Glamping pods also look inviting. Will come back again
Very friendly service and value for price. We stayed here as a stop-over on our drive and had everything we needed.
Great small caravan park. Very neat and well kept. Disappointed you couldn't use the spa after 5pm.
Such a well maintained park with great facilities. Very well kept nice and clean

I have been to a fair few holiday parks, but none as clean and well presented as this place. We stayed in a miners tent, which was exceptional value and so well appointed. The staff were friendly and helpful and everything was spot on, I could go on about how good it is, but you'll have to see for yourself.

We have stayed for a month in our caravan and the staff are very friendly and helpful. Best park we have stayed at due to the cleanliness, the facilities,  closeness to the CBD, visitor experiences and shopping facilities, and the size of sites are larger than others we have stayed at in the past.

This is a great small caravan park close to town. All the staff, and there are plenty of them, are very friendly and accommodating. The amenities are modern and constantly checked and cleaned. The grounds are immaculately maintained. They have sites for caravans & tents but also have cabins and glamping tents all close to a shaded pool and spa.. They have a communal fire pit lit every night plus organised events for the kids. It was a pleasure to stay here and a credit to management and all the staff.

Stayed there on Sunday night in pooch pad coz we have our paw friend with us and we loved it. Loved the backyard area specially for our dog. Very friendly staff. Highly recommended if you wanna bring your pet with you.
Tidiest and most well-manicured caravan park I have ever been to. The best bit was the sculptural fire pit which diligent staff keep going in the evening.

A great caravan park. Having stayed at parks right across Australia, this one is up there with the best. Lots of facilities for the kids to play including pool, mini golf, games hub, jumping pillow (not cushion), basketball, pedal karts, outdoor playground and indoor playground akin to a mini play centre for the littlies.

The caravan park itself is exceptionally well maintained, with lots of grass and super clean amenities blocks. The caravan sites were not squashed up next to each other with a slab, gravel and a grass patch for all sites.

Loved our stay here and will come back again.
Pretty close to the Bendigo city centre,great facilities

Nice peaceful park.  Good location if the horse racing is on.
Amenities were super modern.  Recommend!!!

Stayed for 4 nights in our motorhome. Excellent services and facilities. The whole park was very well maintained and clean. Staff are friendly and helpful. A relaxing and comfortable experience. Will stay there again.
Pod suited us perfectly for one night. Park and facilities were clean and well kept. Even though it was on a main road the park was quiet.

I recently had the most incredible experience staying in the glamping tents, and I can't recommend it enough! The tents were spotless, beautifully presented, and provided all the comforts you could ask for. The attention to detail was impressive, making it feel like a luxurious escape in the heart of nature. The facilities were fantastic, with everything thoughtfully designed for both families and couples. Whether you’re looking for adventure or relaxation, this place has it all. Do yourself a favor and book your stay – you won't regret it!

One of the tidiest and better organised caravan parks we have stayed at. The staff all knew to their jobs very well and were helpful. Toilet facilities were excellent, there were pads for all sites. The dump point was by far the best I have seen. It's a bit out of central Bendigo, but an easy walk to the Botanical Hotel, which I recommend.
Bubbles in spa weren't working when I was there.

I like the  big 4  caravan park and  retirement village up the back of the  park.  Thay have there  own  bus.  Takes  them shopping and  pick them up after.  I would say to phone  them and book  cabin and stay for  week or two.  Somewere for the  children play on.  Go  swimming in the pool and there are games to play and watch  📺 as well.  761 Mclvor highway junortoun great places for  all BBQ as well

Spectacular spot to stay. We had a powered van site. Staff were amazing and incredibly accommodating when they had to have the indoor playground shut for cleaning, they did everything they could to make it up to the kids and got it reopened as quickly as they could. Will absolutely stay again if we are back in Bendigo

We stayed here on the weekend. The park is excellent for kids and our kids had a great time. We choose the park due to how child friendly it is. Our kids loved the play centre. The bed in our cabin was super comfy and the pillows were great I was pleasantly surprised. There was even a coffee can there on Sunday morning! We will definitely be back again, our kids are already demanding it.

We arrived late after closing time and they accommodated us with keys in a afterhours box. The site was easy to get our long caravan into. The office staff were very friendly and helpful. This kids play area is great and they have an indoor area too for the kids
Highly recommend this place
Great kids fun
Nice cabins.

Nice clean park with good van sites and lots of colourful cabins
Plenty of facilities for kids
Sullage drain points are scarce requiring a long hose free there van sites in some places
Some road noise from the highway outside the park
And dog friendly,  comfy beds and clean.
Nice, clean park. Well managed.

We had a great stay here for 3 night with 3 families.

Lots for kids to do. The cabins were great. Staff were friendly. If we come back to Bendigo we will absolutely stay here again!
Wonderful staff at reception.. they are above and beyond helpful & accommodating.. so thank you.. Melynda Johnston & family.
Amazing park! Michelle and Dan are so friendly and great, they gave us a tour of the whole BIG4 park!

For caravanners who now appear to be 2nd class citizens to those who choose cabins.  Not sure why the word Caravan appears in the parks name.  Almost all sites back onto incredibly busy road for trucks day and night and certainly cost a pretty penny.

As a Caravan Park, I couldn’t recommend.
Our site was uncared for, right next to the highway. Loud traffic noise from 6:30 am time 8:30 pm. Amenity Block was only average. Yes it had lots for kids, but we don’t have any need for those facilities, so for us, it was a very expensive and disappointing.
Lovely people and very helpful
Was a friendly and helpful experience from the initial phone call. Thank you Carly you were very helpful to 2 old women on there first motorhome holiday. The ensuites were immaculate.
Can't comment on rooms as I stayed in our camper. Place was great. Plenty to occupy the kids and everything close by. Friendly and helpful staff
Great place to get away. Plenty to occupy the kids and staff are friendly and helpful
Staff were great, wonderful location, great for school holidays
Great sites, roads are wide.  Clean park including all amenities. Staff are extra helpful and friendly.

Nice place to stay. Lots of activities for kids.
Would have been even better if there was less dust as the driveways are gravel.
Perfect place to setup camp and explore.  Well maintained site with friendly staff.
Beautiful place amazing for all age kids

Excellent location not too far from main town , very clean modern and super friendly service.  The kids were so happy with all the facilities.  The playroom, jumping pillows and mini golf were fantastic. Loved the fire 🔥 pit at night.   There is a great pool and entertainment room for games.
Amazing facility, so much for kids to do, hence greater relaxtion time for adults.

Thoroughly enjoyed our time here. The amenities for young families are WONDERFUL - mini golf, jumping pillow/pad, basketball court, indoor and outdoor playground, pool, spa, fire pit with marshmallows and pedal go karts. The kids had a ball here with so much to do without even having to leave the park. We were lucky enough to be in a brand new cabin which was very spacious with a very thought out floorplan and all the amenities you could ask for. Some smaller cabins (2 person) are definitely dated and are closer to the boundary of the racecourse. Staff were friendly and helpful. Will be back!
A great park and perfect stop to stay. We come here in our van and partly for a few days - the place is clean and quiet.
Very nice park, plenty of options
Quiet, family friendly premises. Excellent quality and great value
Great cabin and location 👌

We stayed at BIG4 Bendigo Park Lane Holiday Park during a busy holiday period. The accommodation provided great value for money and "Parkys" indoor playground is amazing our children had an amazing time!
All good handy to the job

Called in for a chat and to check the park out for future stay as near a friend. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Unfortunately the owners have decided to move to fixed accomodation and are relegating caravans to a limited number of sites closest to the front and next to the noisy highway.

This caravan park is obviously still in development and powered sites are mostly on dirt, lacking in comfort and a relaxing outlook. Ensuite sites are much better, but again lack ambiance. Located right on the McIvor Highway, traffic noise is constant. I'm sure given the children's activities there, it's OK for young families booking a cabin, but for mature caravaners seeking a comfortable break, this park is not for you. Staff largely indifferent!

A visit with our caravan
Love the space , has beautiful established trees , amenities very clean ,lovely staff .highly recommended 🤗
Wonderful place to stay.

We have been very disappointed in our Big4 Bendigo Park Lane Holiday Park stay. It started at check in where we were told the en-suite site we had booked had been given to another person as they were part of a large group. We had previously had a phone call and booked this site as it was the most suitable for our large 8 person tent.

Things only got worse from there when we drove to our allocated site past the one we should have been given. Our site bordered on a construction site with exposed electrical wires and general construction site rubbish which was not fenced. When my partner enquired about this the maintenance worker was extremely rude and laughed about our concerns. He came to the conclusion that he would “put up a fence and our site is to end here” and pointed a third of the way up the grass area. As my partner was getting quite agitated trying to rake away the cigarette butts and rocks in 36 degree heat to start setting the tent up to give our 4 children some shade, he asked him to stop talking and give him some space. The staff member continued to berate him before taking off aggressively in his vehicle.

The camp has limited laundry facilities which were made more difficult as when I went to use them 3 machines are out of order. I did not end up being able to do any of my laundry for my family of 6.

In the camp kitchen the fridge/freezer looks like it’s never had a clean and I chose to keep my food semi cold in an esky than use it. There is one bathroom in the outdoor area of the kitchen. When I took my three year old in there the wall with the toilet paper was covered in what looked to be dried on vomit. The bin was seemingly never emptied and overflowing with rubbish. This remained for the duration of our stay.

As a Big4 member we have come to expect a level of professionalism and cleanliness from Big4 parks (and have had incredible experiences at all others so far especially the Park Lane parks) but this park in my opinion does not meet any big 4 standards.

Awesome to stay at a well presented inside and out Big4. It was a quiet and restful stay for myself and children. Pool was great after a HOT day of athletics and the play center was a hit.
Rooms were clean and well presented. Walked into our room on a 36 deg day and it was beautiful and cool inside exactly what we needed. We will be coming back for a holiday for sure.

Stayed here with the family on a site with a great new Ensuite.  I have to say it was by far the best Ensuite we have ever had at any caravan park!  The kids loved the activities and the play centre and I loved being so close to the rail trail and some of the local MTB tracks!  The Staff were fantastic and only too happy to help!

The main bedroom bed was comfortable. The budget cabin was just that and needed a repaint. The pool is a lot smaller than the picture suggests and was overcrowded due to the hot weather. The park wasn’t at capacity and if it were, I would hate to be swimming in that pool because there would be no room to swim. Porkys playground looked outdated and the jumping pad and pool should be open to operate at 9.30 not 11 or 11.30am and closed late to accommodate the kids. The jumping pad closed early and the games room needs to be looked at. The park could be managed a lot better to reflect a better rating and updated to support kids agency and fun. Disappointing experience and won’t be back

Amazing park facilities wise especially for the kids- from the pool, spa, jumping pillow, playcentre, basketball hoop and plenty of space for the kids to ride around. The only con would be the standard vilas (sleeps 6) are located near the permanent residents cabins where some of them are nosey and rude. Couldn’t even sit outside past 10pm because they complaint. I get if we were loud but we were literally just sitting outside having a couple of quiet drinks playing some cards games with the other families we were away with whilst the kids slept inside. Had an elder lady who lives at the sand hurst rise residence telling my 7 year old to ride somewhere else it’s too noisy riding on the gravel??? there’s no sign or rules saying they can’t ride there, it was 8pm. They don’t own the park and shouldn’t be telling holiday markers what todo. They should be allowed to ride around the cabin as long as they’re wearing a helmet and not screaming. Not sure why the retirement village is located next to cabins- definitely a down fall.
Otherwise would definitely recommend 😊

We've stayed here heaps of times. Mostly on a powered Caravan slab site, but also in a 1 bedroom cabin.
Great facilities and activities on-site.
Очень хорошее удобное место.
Wonderful place to stay. Everything is available to everyone and clean and friendly

Stayed in a glamping tent for 2 nights. Fantastic experience at the same price as a hotel room but so much better. Very spacious, extremely clean and has all the luxuries expected.
One suggestion in to include a change machine in the laundry that only takes $1 coins. Will definitely stay again, we loved our time here!
Very clean amenities and immaculate gardens. One of the best parks we have stayed in.  Highly recommended

Had a lovely stay during the busy Lost Trades Fair. Had an ensuite site so really can't comment on amenities however the bbq & camp kitchen was well equipped. In the extreme heat the pool was a godsend each afternoon.

Great friendly park. Cabins were clean, grounds were clean and great for the kids. Sitting around the fire at night is relaxing and the pump track, mini golf and basketball area are really cool to use all year round
Great place to stay with great amenities.
Toller Platz, zu schön für nur 1 Nacht. Alles da was man braucht . SEHR saubere Sanitärräume. Einfach toll.
Just stopped by to have a look. Nice set up.
One of the best parks we've stayed at. Amenities faultless.
I came to Bendigo to attend a reunion. The location suited. The sites & amenities are very clean, tidy and maintained. The receptionist was very welcoming and helpful. I recommend this CP.

Stayed in the caravan park for two days. Having travelled down from Cairns and staying at several caravan parks on the way I would rate this as the best.
Everything was clean and tidy, sites were spacious, amenities spotless.
Admin staff were most welcoming.⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Rooms were clean and tidy, bed was too firm for my liking- but ok.
We had a late check in, instructions for lock box etc were clear and easy to follow.
Plenty of things to do for kids, indoor soft play centre, outside play ground.
Nothing can be said for the pump track and the jumping pillow because staff were late to open it and there were other kids waiting.
- my suggestion would be to open the amenities at 8:30 Atleast. Being a family park most kids/ toddlers have already been up for hours.

stayed in our caravan, just fitted our 23 foot van on our site. The facilities here are one of the best I have seen, huge amenities block clean and newish. massive tv room huge tv and lots of lounges and aircon. lots of tablets and chairs to use. great fire pit (didn't use it) pool and spa which you can book out just for your use (the spa) it was so relaxing. would definitely stay here again
Great park very well presented at all times staff always working to keep it that way.

Lovely friendly staff, great park with everything you need and more. We had the best time. Perfect for families
Would definitely stay again
Only stayed one night. Facilities were very clean and well looked after. Staff friendly and helpful.
Excellent facilities, well maintained and very clean. Loved our stay. Staff were lovely. Thanks!

Exceptional park and service.
Stayed on a powered slab site, which was roomy, with each having their own lawn space and room for a car as well.
Amenities were cleaned multiple times a day.
So much for kids to do, outdoor and indoor play spaces, jumping pillow, bike track, pedal bikes, heated pool and spa as well as their games room and gym spaces.
We stayed during school holidays and there were activities each afternoon for the kids for a gold coin donation toward the cfa.
The staff were amazing, offering local knowledge and advice on what we could do with our 20 month old and were completely professional in every aspect.
Well presented and maintained and really clean toilet/shower amenities
Our favourite Bendigo Holiday Park.

In the middle of January my wife and two crazy boys (20 months and 3 years old) stay on a powered site in our camper. The grounds and sites were immaculately presented and maintained and the park had awesome facilities. Our kids loved the pool, outdoor playground, mini town and indoor play area. The toilets and showers were all cleaned very regularly and the staff were friendly and helpful. We'll definitely be coming back! Thanks Big 4 Tasman Bendigo!

Great caravan park, offered a lot of activities for the kids to do these including jumpy pillow, bike track, play ground, in-door playground, mini golf, pool, spa. There was a fire pit which staff came around and lit and offered marshmallows, the recreation room was huge had a massive TV with comfy seats, pool table, ping pong table and a Xbox on a separate TV. Our stay was in a RV on a paved and grass site, the sites were well maintained and the grass was soft. The safari tents look nice and the cabins looked new and modern definitely a great stay.
Good size  and clean rooms

Due to bad weather destroying our camp site we were in need of alternate accommodation on Christmas eve ..The team at Tasman were amazing and managed to accommodate all 5 of us in a beautiful 3 bedroom cabin .  Made our stay so comfortable and enjoyable. Would definitely recommend this park to everyone.. Thank you Tasman for all your wonderful service..
Quite good. Awkward parking spot.
Caravan powered sites best site with gym  pool dog friendly walk to pub and great Cafe  clean and  above all best  we have ever  visited

The good
The cabins are great. Easy to identify which one is yours and modern inside
The staff are friendly and happy to help
The play centre is great for kids and the outdoor pool is fine
The camp kitchen seemed ok but was always busy
The bad
The showers were terrible. No hot water after the first 10 seconds. If more than 1 person is having a shower then your having a cold shower
The sites were not big for caravans. 6.5m in length and enough room to park your car next to it. Spray painted lines were the divider
There is only 1 camp kitchen for the whole park
There is no security to get in. Anyone can drive in and take things while your asleep
Your next to the highway so you hear the trucks etc through the night
If you’re going to stay then get a cabin and it will be great. If your going to have a caravan then maybe leave it at home this time
Fantastic place to stay with great facilities and activities for the kids!
Surprisingly well appointed for a "budget" room.
Well presented Park. Nice and quiet.
We were on a powered site and were disappointed with the state of the site. It appears the priority of this park is to the cabins.
We stayed in our caravan and just love this place. Lots of work upgrading going on but it’s got to be done and definitely will be returning.
Very family friendly. Quiet location just out of town. Would definitely return to venue.Dog friendly. 🐾🐾😊

Really nice clean park with excellent facilities, very welcoming staff and friendly,

The only thing I could say is the indoor play centre isn’t exclusive to guests at the park…it gets absolutely smashed by residents from Bendigo having revolving kids parties on weekends. So the traffic coming through the park on weekends is massive and lots of cars driving through constantly.

Also, when using your own self contained fire pit you get some instructions of dos and donts, and it asks to dispose of the cold ashes into the steel bins provided….there are no steel bins which reception even confirmed.

This is a pretty good holiday park. We stayed on an ensuite site and it was super clean and aesthetically pleasing. The new owners are very lovely and welcoming, and quick to address an issue we had after hours. They even had a pizza truck and coffee truck visit, and had a band and sausage sizzle one night to raise funds for their little community. Only reason I haven’t given 5 stars is that the dog park is average and quite out of the way, and didn’t have any shade or water, and the grass had lots of prickles that attached to my dogs. But the owner said he has plans to fix it all up so that’s a good sign. The playcentre and jumping pillow is fantastic, the outdoor playground is only okay. It would also benefit from the roads being ashphaulted/concreted so that young kids can ride scooters/bikes a bit more easily and would keep the dust levels down. Would definitely stay here again, pleased overall!

We originally booked a budget cabin, which we discovered was very budget when we arrived. The only good thing was the very comfortable bed. When we went to reception to ask for an upgrade, the staff were very helpful and understanding and gave us a lovely blue cabin the next day, without having to pay the extra fee. It was clean, spacious and comfortable, with oven, stove top, microwave and heating and cooling, plus ceiling fans. The park was quiet, and the children’s playground and train was great. I loved how the cabins were painted in bright colours. The location was not too far out of Bendigo. We would definitely stay there again. Special thanks to the manager for upgrading us at no extra cost, even though we offered to pay.
We stayed here for 4 nights for work. The ladies at the front desk were all super friendly and helpful. The cabin was clean and spacious. Plenty of amenities at the park. Will definitely be back!
What an absolute amazing holiday park, spotlessly clean and the friendliest people, we travelled all the way from WA and will most definitely be back again, highly highly recommended 👍😊

Perfect visit. We stayed in a superior family cabin. Looks recently renovated. Fantastic cabin for our family. Very clean and great facilities. It certainly made for an enjoyable stay and assisted in making our trip easier and relaxing. We did not get to see the entire park as we were on an in-and-out visit, but our quick views left us impressed.  Not that far out of the main centre of Bendigo. Will stay again

The cabins was the perfect size, well maintained and clean. The staff were very helpful and friendly. On our first night there, there was no hot water. Although it was after hours, Michelle and Dan from management sorted out the problem straight away. We could not have asked for better service. And Rachel at reception was lovely and welcoming. We will definitely stay there again.
Had to change my review there guys screaming all night I can not sleep no matter if you talk to them there very rude

We had an amazing time in our cabin at Bendigo Park Lane. The staff were very kind, hospitable and really caring. The cabins were comfortable and well stocked with everything you'll need for your trip.

We were celebrating my partner's birthday weekend and the park was kind enough to organise a very surprising birthday reception (balloons and a very cute handwritten note) to welcome us into our cabin which made my partner's day.

We unfortunately didn't get to spend a lot of time in the holiday park, as we were busy exploring Bendigo. Will definitely visit again to explore.

OH MY GOSH this park is incredible, the staff were lovely and very accommodating, the facilities were all spotless clean and well maintained. We stayed in a cabin which was very clean and well looked after just like the rest of the park, so many great activities for kids and adults, close to the town center but far enough away that it is quiet, We will definitely be back. Highly recommend
Brilliant park large sites well located. Great staff.
Nice park. But increasing the rate of a powered site from $44 per night to $71 a night just because the caravan and camping show is being held is outright robbery
Beautiful cabin, friendly staff.

Hi must say one of the best parks we have stayed in .Thank you Deb and crew such fantastic service .
The park has amenities for young and old from
lovely pool . mini golf to jumping pillow etc etc etc all i can say pick up phone and book guarantee you will not be disappointed

Geoff & Jude 2022 2nd Time at ASCOT PARK

Last year Bendigo hosted Mary Quant exhibition  this year lots of ELVIS PRESLEY'S clothing-MG -CAR -HARLEYDAVIDSON absolutly fantastic.
As again ASCOT CARAVAH PARK with Deb and her staff.MADE US MOST WELCOME. This park has all the bells and whistles  is a must GO TO PARK.The Botanical gardens 5 Min walk away and the Great Botanical hotel next door great food.
WOULD THOROUGHLY RECOMMEND

Hi here we are again 2023 few changes big 4 to TASMAN HOLIDAY PARK  name change
But same great staff to look after your every needs.
Let us know how you get on go and enjoy you time in Bendigo tell staff Geoff  and Jude sent you .HAPPY HOLIDAYS

Can not recommend highly enough. Cracking setup through out the park. Kids had a blast.
New cabins were beautiful, only suggestion for them would be to put some better exhaust fans in the bathrooms to prevent mould. The ones built into the heat lights are rubbish, speaking from experience !

Will be returning asap !
Great job 🤩
Amazing park. So clean and modern. Staff were amazing. Would love to stay again. Everything was fantastic. Thanks
Great place to stay caravan park has so much for the kids to do you will not regret staying here cabins are so clean great stay
Great CVP. Many upgrades have been done since we started staying here. Highly recommend staying here.
The grounds, amenities, staff. Truly amazing.

Wow the Tasman Big 4 was amazing.  It has restored my faith in Parks after my last experience at Mildura.
Not only is it a beautiful park, the cabins are lovely and so perfectly clean and the staff were absolutely delightful.
Stayed in the studio cabin whilst horses at vets for a few days and perfect size and in a lovely quiet spot and was able to catch up on some much needed rest whilst also doing work.
Would come back in a heartbeat and highly recommend the Tasman Big 4 Bendigo to everyone travelling, you wont be disappointed

This Park is one of the best Big4's I have stayed at. Spotlessly clean, great facilities, cabins are roomy and comfortable beds. Staff are always friendly and approachable. We come here every year and wouldn't stay anywhere else.

Great place for young families! Clean rooms, well maintained showers, common areas and great for place for caravans and camps. They have great glamping tents with cubby house bedding for kids! Great outdoors and play areas for kids. Common areas have table tennis table, billiards and xbox. Jacuzzi and swimming pool are nice too! We absolutely loved our stay here! Staff are very friendly and accomodating!
Couldn't be happier with this holiday park. We only had a short stay but the kids could have happily been entertained there for a week

One of the best big 4 parks I have stayed in, everything from checking in to checking out was great. We had two 3 room cabins and they were just like living in a house, I recommend this park to everyone
Excellent caravan park. Awesome facilities for kids and adults. Owners are great too, very helpful.

Enjoyed my 3 day stay. Pricey and great facilities for kids...
Not that I have any with me.

We stayed at the Big 4 during the September school holidays with two young people who use wheelchairs. While the car park and reception area were accessible, the rest of the park was not. The only bathroom they could use was the family room, which wasn’t a major issue in itself, but there were no ramps to access it. This meant we had to push the kids uphill on the grass, which almost resulted in one of them falling out of their chair.

The most significant problem was that the only accessible shower was located in the female bathroom, which forced us to wait until 11 PM to close off the entire facility so one of the boys could shower privately.

Additionally, the kitchen and recreation rooms had no accessible entry, and we were left having to physically lift the kids to get them inside.

Overall, it was a humiliating experience for the young people at a park that advertises itself as accessible.

*** more then happy to provide more detail/information if needed***
Our cabin was amazing. A true home away from home, had everything we needed and everything was so new and clean. Comfortable beds. The park facilities are great, kids were very well entertained.
Great location very packed though. Completely understandable.
Friendly staff, great facilities, and the superior cabin we were in had fantastic amenities. Nice clean park. Kids had a ball.

First time here.
Very modern and clean rooms .
Friendly staff and plenty for the kids to do.
The newly built ensuite site is excellent, but unfortunately the rest of the park needs a major upgrade though.

So much for families and kids to do here.
Definitely would recommend this park to any traveller.

Totally recommend 👌🏽 I love the mixture of colors. It's great to identify which cabin you're in, Green was our color 💚 The cabin was so comfortable & cozy and came with a carport, thank you so much we absorbed every moment 😀

Superb service
Awesome colourful park
Excellent facilities
Clean
Thanks so much for the free upgrade to ensuite site

My partner and I came here for a getaway, the park in itself is absolutely beautiful, it’s spacious and has all the necessities you’d need to go powered camping.
Our second day, we hit a horrible storm, the receptionist asked if we could use a cabin to stay dry and warm, my partner and are have been looked after so well, we were so grateful to be offered a cabin free of charge! We used their kitchen, it had everything you could possibly need, we cooked a meal on our last night, with no dramas!! Plenty of resources and materials to use if you did t bring anything. The staff looked after us very well, we will be returning when we next come for a holiday.

We were in a tent on a powered site here during a particularly nasty storm with high winds. Around 7pm, completely unprompted, the owner offered to allow us to use a cabin for the night free of charge. Having the cabin really turned our trip around, we were able to get our things dry and have a decent meal, and we just really appreciated the kindess the owners showed, particularly outside of hours.

The cabin was really nice (and warm), and the powered site is exactly what you'd expect, a green patch of grass with water and power. The toliets and showers were some of the cleanest I've ever seen and the water was a great temperature. The communal kitchen has everything you need to cook and the games room had a pool table, table tennis and a TV (with season 2 of Ben 10 OG :o )

The pool was a fair size, and the jumping pillow looked really good (my girlfriend wouldn't let me use it because "its for kids"), and the site as a whole is really quiet and peaceful.

It's about a 5-10 minute drive to the city centre and is really easy to find.

My family stayed for a an overnight stay. Kids had a great time in the indoor play centre, jumping pillow and park. Staff were very friendly and very accommodating. We received a upgrade on our cabin and got to stay in one the the brand new ones. It was lovely, very comfortable.
Thank you again and we look forward to staying again over summer.

This is a lovely Caravan Park approx 15 minutes drive from the main centre. Lovely colourful cabins. We stayed in the new accessible cabin which had its pluses and minuses from a disability standpoint. Large shower and high toilet (well placed from wall) in the bathroom. Very comfortable Queen bed in main room. Great wide ramp access and lovely bbq deck. The minuses are a low couch and very lightweight dining chairs. ( my bad hip would not allow me to sit in - so sat in my w/chair) Very low (ground) dishwasher and low under bench microwave (hard to access) which are not disabled friendly. However these issues are small and it’s a lovely park to stay. Management are aware of these issues and I am sure they will rectify.
Very nice place
Great cabins,  very clean and large

Wow where do I start lol.Got to check in was advised no dogs allowed in reception. It's a dog friendly park apparently. Reception advised I had to pay for my dog extra 75.The lady next door to me said they done the same to her.No where on the page you book does it state extra.The dog can't sleep on the bed or couch.The park policy is if the dog sheds excess hair you pay 200 .
What is the fee for the dog then.Do you pay for the air he breathes.For a dog friendly park they make it hard to consider returning. I Like many people do not like hidden charges and I like my dog to feel wanted and welcomed in a dog friendly park.i left one day earlier it was raining hard but I could not lock him the cabin because I was concerned by the cleaning charges.The cleaning staff really friendly and loved patting my dog.pity the rest of the place is not dog friendly.
Decent enough, but could have been cleaner
As you would expect at a Big 4. Very good service and camp ground - book before you attend
Money hungry business. Kept my deposit after I rebooked. Stay somewhere else

We really enjoyed our stay ! We stayed in the wheelchair ACCESSIBLE cabin it was very clean & manageable although the only thing I can say is for a person with a severe spinal cord injury the seating wasn't comfortable as the couches are too low & the dining chairs aren't comfortable or supportive but a disability high backed chair would be wonderful to add to the space for comfort to the disabled. The accesible shower & toilet were great although some non slip matting would be great on the shower floor & bench seat for added safety 😊 kids absolutely loved the entire space of the holiday park and so did I 😊😊😊 would absolutely stay again 👌

Buyer beware. We booked and paid for our cabin through the Big4 website, and provided details of all our guests including our dog. When we arrived we were charged an additional fee for our dog. The receptionist said that there's a problem with the website where it doesn't calculate pet fees properly. She said they usually email ahead of time to let guests know, but forgot to.
